ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF WDR RESTORATION INC., REPRESENTED BY MARIA NEUMANN, OWNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN WARNER IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY WDR RESTORATION INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WARNER, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WDR RESTORATION INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WARNER, JOHN $2,254.40 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,439.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
